content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation modules like ICM (Integrated Curiosity Mechanism) for autonomous agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only memory traces that trigger intrinsic curiosity are retained and elevated to long-term storage. This creates a self-organizing memory system that automatically prioritizes information that supports future exploratory learning rather than just storing high-frequency or reward-linked data.
